rationale: In the theory development section, the citing paper uses Goldsmith and Amir (2010) as direct evidence that uncertainty in promotions can increase promotional effectiveness, contrasting this with work showing negative effects of uncertainty. This citation helps motivate the paper's core conceptual setup that variable exchange rates may induce optimism and thereby change redemption behavior. The reference is therefore doing more than a passing mention, even though the citing study does not reuse the cited paper's exact design.
relation_description: The citing paper relies on Goldsmith and Amir (2010) as prior conceptual evidence that uncertain promotional structures can outperform certain ones. It uses that foundation to develop and test a related uncertainty-based mechanism in loyalty point redemption under variable versus fixed exchange rates.
